hooks.command: $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $j = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -like "*CLAUDE.md") { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName="PreToolUse";permissionDecision="ask";permissionDecisionReason="About to update CLAUDE.md - please confirm this change reflects completed work."}} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }
